questions.question: Describe the effects of a color space transformation from RGB to HSV on an image, and explain the significance of the resulting hue, saturation, and value components.
questions.hint: Consider the implications for image analysis and display.

questions.question: A color image is smoothed using a 3x3 Gaussian filter. If the original image has a pixel value of 128, what is the expected smoothed pixel value?
questions.hint: Consider the effect of averaging on pixel values.

questions.question: An image segmentation algorithm uses color histograms to separate objects in a scene. Which color model is most suitable for this application, and why?
questions.hint: Consider the color properties required for segmentation.
